_comment: Copy this to .claude/settings.json (or merge its 'hooks' block into your existing settings). All hooks are WARNING-ONLY + fail-open: they print reminders and ALWAYS exit 0, never blocking. OPTIONAL: to gate DB migrations or a deploy tool, add a PreToolUse entry whose matcher is that tool's name, pointing at gate-migration.mjs / gate-deploy-push.mjs (see README).
